title: Spring Boot 3.x + Spring Security 6.x JWT Implementation
excerpt: A 7-class JWT blueprint for clean authentication. Covers MyUser entity, AuthController, JwtAuthFilter, JwtUtil, and 5 critical mistakes to avoid.

title: Spring Boot Complete Guide — Basics to Advanced Microservices
excerpt: A complete roadmap for building production-ready Spring Boot applications — from auto-configuration and DI to microservices with Spring Cloud, Eureka, and Resilience4j.

title: Java Microservices Interview Prep Guide
excerpt: No-nonsense guide for backend and system design interviews covering architecture, async communication with Kafka, Hibernate data management, and Bean Validation.

title: Java · Spring Boot · Microservices · Angular Interview Prep Guide
excerpt: Comprehensive full-stack interview prep covering Core Java, Spring Boot, JPA, testing, coding challenges, Angular, Git, and DevOps strategies.

title: System Design Interview Handbook
excerpt: A 75-page structured resource covering core fundamentals, architecture trade-offs, distributed systems concepts, and 10 common interview problems.

title: Java Developer Roadmap 2025
excerpt: Structured guide for aspiring Java developers: from fundamentals and database skills to Spring, microservices, testing, DevOps, and cloud platforms.

title: Best Practices for Building Scalable Backend Systems
excerpt: Scalability is more than adding servers — microservices, horizontal scaling, caching with Redis, circuit breakers, and observability with Prometheus and Grafana.

title: PR Review Bot — Intelligent Automated Code Review
excerpt: Built an automated code review system with dual-engine analysis: static heuristics for secrets and null pointers + local LLM inference via Ollama. Privacy-first and production-ready.

title: Fully Local AI Voice Assistant in Rust — Sub-900ms Latency
excerpt: A 100% local Rust voice assistant: Whisper.cpp for STT, Ollama (Phi 2.7) for reasoning, Piper-TTS for speech. Async Tokio pipeline, zero cloud dependencies.

title: Docker Architecture — A Visual Breakdown
excerpt: What actually happens when you run docker build, pull, and run. Images are read-only templates; containers add a writable layer — deploy dozens from one image.

title: Cloudflare Outage Post-Mortem — When a Routine Change Breaks Production
excerpt: A database permissions change caused duplicate rows in ClickHouse, exceeding a hardcoded 200-feature limit. System-wide panics cascaded across ChatGPT, X/Twitter, Discord, and more.

title: Online Markdown Editor — Open Source Project Launch
excerpt: Live split-screen GitHub Flavored Markdown editor with section-based mode, autosave, draft versioning, and export. Client-side only — no backend, no data leaves your browser.

title: Containerized Minecraft Server — Docker + Playit.gg
excerpt: PaperMC inside Docker with Playit.gg tunneling — no port forwarding needed. One-command setup with scripts for start, stop, backup, and management.

title: Nmap Commands Cheatsheet — Network Scanning Reference
excerpt: 40+ vital Nmap commands for cybersecurity and network administration: target specification, host discovery, port scanning, OS detection, and NSE scripting.

title: Vim Cheatsheet — Commands as a Language
excerpt: Vim organized into a structured cheatsheet covering basic commands, advanced text objects and registers, and the Vim mental model — commands as a composable language.

title: Git Mastery Guide — From Basics to DevOps
excerpt: Essential Git commands every developer should know: branching, merging, rebasing, stashing, submodules, hooks, and CI/CD integration with GitOps workflows.
